overall.description: A cinematic first-person walkthrough of a futuristic cyberpunk city plaza at dusk, featuring neon holographic advertisements, outdoor cafes with yellow umbrellas, and vertical garden corridors. The high-quality game engine footage showcases a commercial district blending natural elements with high-tech architecture and digital billboards.

vibrant pink flowering vegetation in planters along the walkway
towering buildings covered in large-scale holographic advertisements and neon signage

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on an elevated glass walkway overlooking a futuristic city plaza. Pink flowering bushes line the left side while holographic advertisements illuminate the glass towers in the distance. The camera moves forward along the transparent railing, offering a clear view of the glass canopy covering the central plaza below.

scene_state.functional_zone: outdoor dining terrace with holographic signage

events.description: descends stairs from elevated walkway into lower outdoor seating area
turns right toward the cafe seating with yellow umbrellas

agents.ego_description: descending stairs and approaching outdoor cafe seating with large holographic face visible on building wall

illuminated yellow umbrellas shading outdoor dining tables
circular seating arrangements with glowing base lighting

segments.scene_description: The camera descends stairs from the elevated walkway into a lower terrace area. A massive vertical holographic face dominates the right-side building facade. Yellow umbrellas and outdoor seating pods appear as the camera turns right, revealing NPCs seated at cafe tables. The glass railing and plaza canopy recede behind as the descent continues.

scene_state.functional_zone: wooden promenade with outdoor cafe seating

events.description: passes closely by seated NPCs at cafe tables while continuing forward

agents.ego_description: walking through outdoor cafe area past seated patrons under illuminated yellow umbrellas

NPC couple conversing at cafe table under yellow umbrella

entered.detail: indoor cafe space with glass walls and neon signage reading 'CINNAMON'
large planters containing mature trees along the walkway edge

segments.scene_description: Moving through the outdoor cafe promenade on wooden decking, the camera passes between tables of seated NPCs under glowing yellow umbrellas. A cafe bar structure with neon signage becomes visible on the left, while tree planters line the right side. The large holographic face and stairway recede behind as the walkway continues forward.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial walkway with vending machines and digital billboards

events.description: encounters cleaning workers maintaining the walkway surface
approaches entrance to covered corridor with vertical garden walls

agents.ego_description: walking past maintenance workers and rows of yellow vending machines along the commercial walkway

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions to a commercial walkway where cleaning workers in safety vests maintain the wooden deck. Yellow vending machines line the left wall beneath large digital advertising screens. The camera passes the workers and approaches the entrance to a covered corridor, with an escalator structure visible in the distance on the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian corridor with living walls and digital ceiling

events.description: enters covered corridor with vertical garden walls and illuminated digital ceiling

agents.ego_description: walking through enclosed corridor lined with lush vertical gardens and digital ceiling displays

entered.detail: dense vertical gardens covering wall surfaces with various green plants
transparent ceiling with digital overlay displaying sky and abstract patterns
dark reflective tiled flooring with neon accent lighting
sleek metallic seating with illuminated edges along the corridor

segments.scene_description: Entering the covered corridor, the environment becomes enclosed with dense living green walls on both sides and a digital glass ceiling displaying animated skies above. The reflective corridor floor mirrors the neon lighting. Modern benches line the walkway as the camera moves through this tranquil, garden-like passage distinct from the open plaza outside.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from an elevated vantage point overlooking a neon-lit plaza into a secluded, futuristic garden corridor. It begins on a glass walkway lined with pink flowering bushes, moving forward past holographic advertisements and a transparent canopy before descending a set of stairs toward a lower terrace. As the camera turns right, the open vista shifts into an intimate outdoor cafe promenade where it glides past seated NPCs under glowing yellow umbrellas and neon signage. The scene then transitions onto a wooden commercial walkway, passing cleaning workers and yellow vending machines beneath large digital screens before approaching a covered entrance. Finally, the environment becomes fully enclosed as the camera enters a tranquil corridor characterized by dense living green walls, reflective floors, and a digital glass ceiling displaying animated skies.
